scenes.text:
You might be the first in your family to
build wealth. Let the chain start with you.

Generational wealth is not about leaving a pile of money. It is about leaving financial knowledge, habits, and systems. Teach your children about investing at age
ten. Show them how compound interest works. Let them see you budget, invest, and build. The greatest inheritance is not a check. It is a blueprint.

Even if nobody taught you about money, you can teach the next generation. Break the
cycle of financial illiteracy. Be the first domino that changes your family tree forever.

You are not just building wealth for
yourself. You are building a legacy.

Are you the first wealth builder in your
family? Share your journey. Follow for generational thinking.
